//: Basically just a flag to show you're away from base.  This trait on your character is what tells the EOC to start increasing your warp sickness.
description: You are operating in the Zone.  Over time, you will begin to succumb to the Zone's anomalous radiation and psychic interference, causing your abilities to deteriorate.  You have several hours after deployment before this becomes problematic, after which it will rapidly worsen until you extract or die.

//: This is the warp sickness effect which makes it hard to stay away from base for too long.  Intensity 1 is the strongest while Intensity 5 is the weakest and has no penalties.  This effect does not increase or decrease on its own, rather it is controlled exclusively by a recurring EOC which checks how long you've been away from base and intermittently moves you towards intensity 1.  The decay messages don't seem to display this way but they're left here anyway.
name: Anomaly Breakdown!
Cellular Necrosis
Severe Contamination
Anomaly Sickness
Radiation Nausea
Zone Stability
desc: You're dying from massive anomaly exposure.  Blood leaks from every pore as your cellular structure breaks down.  Your only hope is immediate extraction to the laboratory's reconstruction chamber.
The Zone's anomalous fields are unraveling your molecular structure!  You're in critical condition.  You need to reach the extraction point NOW!

You've been in the Zone WAY too long!  Your body barely responds and your senses are failing.  The Zone's psychic interference feels like needles in your brain, and breathing is like inhaling broken glass.  If you want to survive, you need to extract immediately.

You've been in the Zone too long.  Radiation sickness is setting in - your body aches and your senses are dulling.  Every movement feels sluggish and breathing is labored.  You should extract soon, or this contamination will only worsen.

You've exceeded safe Zone exposure limits.  Concentration is difficult, there's painful static in your head, and your muscles spasm uncontrollably.  Every action feels delayed.  You need to extract and decontaminate soon, or this will worsen rapidly.

You're fresh from the safety of your laboratory.  The Zone's anomalous radiation has no effect on you yet, and you feel fine.  This protection should last several hours.  Stay too long, however, and you'll gradually begin suffering from cumulative anomaly exposure.
decay_messages: Fatal anomaly exposure!  Your cellular structure is collapsing and your blood is crystallizing.  Excruciating pain overwhelms everything.  You're not just dying - you're being unmade at the molecular level.  Only immediate extraction to the lab's reconstruction chamber can save you, but time is running out.
Blood fills your mouth and your vision distorts.  Severe Zone contamination is destroying your body from within.  Your anomaly sickness is reaching critical levels.  Extract NOW!
The Zone's effects intensify.  Radiation burns spread across your skin and psychic interference scrambles your thoughts.  Your anomaly sickness is unbearable.  You need extraction immediately.
Nausea overwhelms you and nerve damage causes excruciating tingling.  Your contamination levels are rising.  You should extract soon.
Visual distortions blur your sight.  Everything feels sluggish and unreal.  Anomaly sickness is setting in.  You should focus on extraction.

name: Molecular Breakdown!
//: This is a very bad effect that will kill you in short order by damaging your torso over time.  It is only activated by the recurring EOC which checks how long you've been away from base, and always at the same time that you reach warp sickness intensity 1.
desc: Extreme anomaly exposure is destroying your cellular structure.  You're literally falling apart.
apply_message: Your body is breaking down at the molecular level!
remove_message: The anomalous breakdown has stopped.  Your cellular structure stabilizes.

name: Phase-shifted
//: A simple invisibility that decays on its own and whose duration is set in the teleport to world EOCs.
desc: You are phase-shifted and invisible for a brief time while the teleportation matrix stabilizes.  Use this opportunity to reach cover.  You're also partially incorporeal, preventing fall damage.
remove_message: You fully materialize.  You're not invisible anymore!

//: Blacklisting the alien bomb prevents people from spawning on top of it but will reduce the incidence of craters which is no big loss
